chunks.title: David seeks Saul's family
chunks.reason: David inquires about surviving members of Saul's house and locates Mephibosheth through Ziba.

chunks.title: Mephibosheth restored to favor
chunks.reason: Mephibosheth arrives before David, receives a promise of land and table fellowship, and Ziba is assigned to serve him.

chunks.title: Mephibosheth settles in Jerusalem
chunks.reason: The narrative concludes with Mephibosheth's family details and his permanent residence in Jerusalem.
